MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-17-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS BY AND BETWEEN A. LENGYEL AND PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC, PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE 10134 ET SEQ. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE PETITION COMPLIES WITH CAL. INS. CODE SEC. 10134 ET SEQ. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: GORDON F. AIAVAO, CSR # 11216, EMAIL: GAIAVAO@SFTC.ORG.
PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS FILED BY PETITIONER PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING LLC AS TO RESPONDENT NONE

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights By And Between A. Lengyel And Peachtree Settlement Funding, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Aug-17-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter Liederman, Esq., Tel. 510.681.6916, specially appearing for petitioner Peachtree Settlement Funding LLC;
Anna Lengyel, Tel. 234.542.9220, transferor, appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: There being no objection by either party present in court, the tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONER PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights By And Between A. Lengyel And Peachtree Settlement Funding, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq. is granted. No opposition filed and the petition complies with Cal. Ins. Code sec. 10134 et seq. Order signed. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Gordon F. Aiavao, CSR # 11216, email: gaiavao@sftc.org.
